title: URLs: Website Addresses
drDigitalIntro:
Every website has an address called a URL.
• It looks like www.google.com or www.wikipedia.org.
• It tells your browser where to go.
• Type it in the address bar and press Return to visit.

playgroundTask.goal: Type a web address to visit a site

steps.say: A URL is a website's address. Click the address bar, type google.com and press Enter to go there.

drDigitalSuccess: You typed a URL and the browser took you straight there. That's how you reach any website when you know its address.
drDigitalHint: Click the address bar at the top, type google.com, and press Enter. No need for the http:// part.
